message:
fix(providers): add developer→System role mapping and fix Pi-Agent usage lookup

- Add "developer" to normalize_role System arm — Codex writes System
  messages as "developer" role, so round-trip was silently converting
  them to Other("developer") instead of keeping them as System
- Fix Pi-Agent usage field lookup: search message.usage (nested level)
  before falling back to envelope-level usage — Pi-Agent stores usage
  inside the message object, not at the envelope root

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
